devSite.heroText: All in plain English, 中文, Deutsch, हिन्दी
devSite.businessExpertBody: Compliance officer, risk analyst, or policy author. You want rules in your language, with AI helping you write the first draft.
devSite.developerBody: You want a deterministic, auditable rules engine you can embed — two runtimes, one IR, every decision replayable.

playground.title: Playground
playground.subtitle: Write a rule, run it, see the decision.
